name: ModalHaveNegative
formula: SUBJ [do/does NEG have]/[haven't got to] V

name: ModalHaveQuestions
formula: [Do/Does SUBJ have]/ [Have/has SUBJ got to] V

name: NounPhraseWithRelativePostmodifier
formula: NP CLAUSE.REL = [DET (ADJ)+ NOUN] (REL SUBJ V … | SUBJ V … ØOBJ)

name: DoYouKnowIndirectQuestions
formula: do you know wh/if SUBJ V

name: PossessivePronounYoursObject
formula: SUBJ be yours / V yours / PREP/ yours

name: ThereBeALotOf
formula: there are a lot of NP

name: NegationWithAnyMuchMany
formula: SUBJ AUX not V any/much/many NP
